headline: Kroger (KR) Valuation Check As US$112 Million Store Investments And New Offerings Support Growth Narrative
summary: Kroger (KR) is back in focus after outlining more than US$112 million of store projects in central and northwest Ohio, along with branded product expansion and pharmacy offerings that together reshape its broader retail footprint. See our latest analysis for Kroger. The latest store investments, product launches and pharmacy offerings come after a period of solid share price momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 13.50% and a 5 year total shareholder return of 122.07%. This suggests...

headline: Warren Buffett Was Right: Better Grab Safe Berkshire Hathaway Dividend Stocks Now
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s massive portfolio is invested in ... Warren Buffett Was Right: Better Grab Safe Berkshire Hathaway Dividend Stocks Now
